title: The Language of Silence
subtitle: An 8 Week Physical Acting and Mime Class
description: A progressive physical performance course focused on illusion, tension control, emotional clarity, and ensemble awareness.

title: Short-form Improv Coached Jam
subtitle: Learn and play improv games
description:
Come learn and play improv games with the cast of Comedy Pageant.

All experience levels welcome

title: DK's Stand-up Forge
subtitle: A place to refine the skills you have and gain the ones you don't!
description: A stand-up comedy course designed for people of all skill levels. Refine your craft and build new skills over six weeks of focused training.

title: DK's Improv Forge
subtitle: A place to refine the skills you have and gain the ones you don't!
description: An improv course designed for people of all skill levels. Refine your craft and build new skills over six weeks of focused training.

title: DK's Sketch Forge
subtitle: A place to refine the skills you have and gain the ones you don't!
description: A sketch comedy course designed for people of all skill levels. Refine your craft and build new skills over six weeks of focused training.

title: Janelle's Improv Workshop
subtitle: Have fun and break bad habits
description:
Join Janelle Kloth for a diagnostics based workshop for anyone looking to level up their improv!

$40, or $35 if you register by April 4.

title: Card Magic for Beginners
subtitle: Sleight-of-hand crash course
description: A crash course in the basics of sleight-of-hand card magic. You'll learn to handle a deck of cards like a pro. Skills taught include how to shuffle cards, control cards, and more. Plus learn tricks you can perform right away to entertain your friends, family, and maybe even fool a magician.
